headline: CarMax (KMX) Stock Weighs Mixed Returns Against Tight DCF Valuation Range
summary: If you are wondering whether CarMax stock is attractively priced today, the starting point is understanding how its current market value lines up against different measures of worth. Recently, the share price closed at US$47.43, with the stock down 2.2% over the past week, up 28.0% over the last 30 days and up 20.7% year to date, while still showing a decline of 26.3% over 1 year, 39.4% over 3 years and 59.9% over 5 years. These mixed returns have come as investors reassess used car demand,...
